channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Cybersecurity in the Age of Instant Software
item.description: AI is rapidly changing how software is written, deployed, and used. Trends point to a future where AIs can write custom software quickly and easily: “instant software.” Taken to an extreme, it...

item.title: When Your Security Scanner Becomes the Weapon: Lessons from the Trivy Supply Chain Attack
item.description: This article was originally published on LucidShark Blog. When Your Security Scanner Becomes the Weapon: Lessons from the Trivy Supply Chain Attack On March 19, 2026, a group called TeamPCP...

item.title: The Master Algorithm
item.description: In 2015, a book by AI researcher Pedro Domingos came out called The Master Algorithm: How the Quest for the Ultimate Learning Machine Will Remake Our World. The author explored the "five tribes"...

item.title: Golden Suite + MCP: Giving AI Agents a Data Cleaning Toolkit
item.description: An AI agent can write SQL, draft an email, and refactor a repo. Ask it to deduplicate a 50,000-row customer file and it will cheerfully hand you a pandas.drop_duplicates() one-liner that finds...

item.title: Russia Hacked Routers to Steal Microsoft Office Tokens
item.description: Hackers linked to Russia's military intelligence units are using known flaws in older Internet routers to mass harvest authentication tokens from Microsoft Office users, security experts warned...

item.title: From Dirty CSV to Golden Records: A Python Walkthrough
item.description: Download a government CSV, load it into pandas, and you'll find "MEMORIAL HOSPITAL" listed twelve times across six states. Run drop_duplicates() — it finds zero exact copies. Try deduplicating on...

item.title: The rugged Bose Soundlink Flex is 25 percent off right now
item.description: We saw a host of excellent Bose discounts during Amazon’s so-called Big Spring Sale last month; however, none of them were quite as steep as the current price drop we’re seeing on the latest Bose...

item.title: I Got a Teams Message: 'Why Do We Need a Semantic Layer?'
item.description: It was Monday morning. Our team was sitting through a technical architecture meeting. I could see Sarah's face — confused, frustrated, checking her watch. When the meeting ended, I got a Teams...

item.title: WordPress MCP Plugin: Connect Claude AI Directly to Your WordPress Site
item.description: If you use Claude as your AI assistant and manage a WordPress site, there is a direct way to connect the two — a WordPress MCP plugin called PressBridge. Instead of describing what you want,...

item.title: EVAL #009: MCP Hit 10,000 Servers. Is It Actually Ready for Production?
item.description: EVAL #009: MCP Hit 10,000 Servers. Is It Actually Ready for Production? By Ultra Dune | EVAL — The AI Tooling Intelligence Report | April 7, 2026 Every tool in your stack shipped an update this...

item.title: Media Offloading: Why Your AI Agent Should Never Touch an Audio Stream
item.description: Building a voice-capable AI agent sounds hard. You imagine it: raw RTP packets, G.711 codecs, jitter buffers, WebRTC negotiation, VAD (voice activity detection), and somehow, on top of all that,...

item.title: Building Your Private AI Infrastructure — Part 2 of 5 Free series. All open-source. No DevOps background required.
item.description: Estimated hands-on time: 45–90 minutes. Laying the Foundation: Vultr, Ubuntu, and Zero-Trust in an Afternoon Building Your Private AI Infrastructure [Part 2 of 5] Free series. All open-source. No...

item.title: AI Won't Save You From Bad Engineering
item.description: When power tools first became widely available, did everyone suddenly become a master carpenter? Of course not. Operating a circular saw still requires the skill and knowledge to use the tool...

item.title: Vertical browser tabs are better and you should use them
item.description: Google's Chrome browser is getting a couple of new features, both of them extremely welcome and wildly overdue. The first is a reading mode, which does what it already does in most other browsers:...

item.title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips
item.description: Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.

item.title: Suno and major music labels reportedly clash over AI music sharing
item.description: The AI-powered musicmaker Suno is struggling to reach licensing deals with Universal Music Group and Sony Music Entertainment. That's according to a report from the Financial Times, which says...

item.title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
item.description: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.

item.title: Satechi’s 3-in-1 travel stand now wirelessly charges your phone at 25W
item.description: The WPC introduced the Qi2.2 standard in April 2025, but the rollout of faster wireless chargers has been relatively slow. Following companies like Nomad, Belkin, and Kuxiu, Satechi has announced...

item.title: The Moto Pad is Motorola’s first US-bound tablet in over a decade
item.description: Motorola announced two new devices today, including one of its first tablets to be available from a US carrier since Verizon's Xyboard tablets in 2011. The new Moto Pad is joined by the 2026...

item.title: Intel will help build Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip factory
item.description: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip project in Austin, Texas, is gaining a crucial new partner: Intel. On Tuesday, the American chipmaker announced it was signing on to help design and build the sprawling...

item.title: At $150 off, the new MacBook Air is now cheaper than last year’s model
item.description: If you were bummed that the new M5-powered MacBook Air cost $100 more than last year’s model, we’ve got some good news: it’s now cheaper than its predecessor. You can currently buy the latest...

item.title: Google Maps can now write captions for your photos using AI
item.description: Gemini can now create captions when users are looking to share a photo or video.

item.title: Docker CVE-2026-34040 Lets Attackers Bypass Authorization and Gain Host Access
item.description: A high-severity security vulnerability has been disclosed in Docker Engine that could permit an attacker to bypass authorization plugins (AuthZ) under specific circumstances. The vulnerability,...

item.title: Desalination plants in the Middle East are increasingly vulnerable
item.description: MIT Technology Review Explains: Let our writers untangle the complex, messy world of technology to help you understand what’s coming next. You can read more from the series here. As the conflict...

item.title: First photos of solar eclipse from Artemis II crew look almost too good to be real
item.description: The Artemis II astronauts have already captured some incredible sights of the Earth and Moon during their journey. Now we can add a new visual to that list: a total solar eclipse as seen from deep...

item.title: 4 days left to save close to $500 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 passes
item.description: Four days left to save up to $482 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket. These low rates will disappear on April 10 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now.

item.title: Enabling agent-first process redesign
item.description: Unlike static, rules-based systems, AI agents can learn, adapt, and optimize processes dynamically. As they interact with data, systems, people, and other agents in real time, AI agents can...

item.title: Asus’ lightweight 16-inch laptop is a formidable MacBook Air alternative
item.description: I already put Asus' new Zenbook A16 through the wringer when I brought a pre-production unit with me to CES. I loved it for its ample power in an impressively light 16-inch chassis. It's speedy...

item.title: Apple’s sci-fi thriller Dark Matter is back in August
item.description: Over the last few years summer has turned out to be a great time for new streaming sci-fi, and 2026 is shaping up to be much the same. Apple just announced that its multiversal thriller Dark...

item.title: The AI gold rush is pulling private wealth into riskier, earlier bets
item.description: On a recent episode of Equity, we talked to Arena Private Wealth to explore a growing trend: family offices bypassing VCs to gain direct exposure to AI startups, turning them from passive...
